# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are accepted for the latest published release of Pummel.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues privately to contact@orekgames.com.

Include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Reproduction steps or a proof of concept when possible
- Affected versions or commit hashes if known

We will acknowledge the report and work with you on a coordinated disclosure
timeline. Please do not open a public issue for vulnerability reports that
could put users at risk.
